localizations.title: Escape from the Eiffel Tower
localizations.hint_6: The spyglass allows me to see more closely an object that shines in the distance.
localizations.hint_7: Yun's phone must be unlocked at all costs, but she has been knocked out. Could her code be related to the Escape Geeks?
localizations.hint_8: This key will allow you to access the 2nd floor. Be observant by spotting the lock that could accommodate this old key.
localizations.hint_14: What runes is the seal that protected the Eiffel Tower composed of? Remember that enchantments were present on the 2nd page of Merlin's Book. The guardian having stolen it, fortunately you took a photo of it... All that remains is to unlock Yun's phone and choose the right enchantment.
localizations.hint_15: Start by correctly assembling the pieces of your viewpoints from the Eiffel Tower. The first 4 (A, B, C and D) form a rectangle in the center of which the last one (E) is superimposed. Now spot the light lines and start from the one at the foot of the Eiffel Tower, then follow its direction until you cross another one. Continue like this to reveal the rune.
localizations.hint_16: The iconography visible on the machine seems to indicate that two coins must be inserted to make a commemorative coin: a small coin that will be deformed to constitute the commemorative coin and a 1 euro coin to pay.
localizations.hint_23: There are, on either side of the page, holes probably allowing to fix something on each side.
localizations.hint_24: This small coin is not of great value, but it can serve you at the commemorative coin machine.
localizations.hint_25: The socket located under the decoration seems to be able to accommodate something. When you have an object of the same shape, try to place it there.
localizations.hint_26: By scratching the paint, it must be possible to reveal what is hidden there. But with what to scratch?
localizations.hint_27: The last time Romain took a sandwich during an adventure, it was snatched from him by a big bird...
localizations.hint_32: A way must be found to attract the pigeons elsewhere so that they clear the view. You have something that could greatly interest them...
localizations.hint_33: Once you have found the right reel to watch (99), this plate will indicate the order of the 4 steps of construction of the Eiffel Tower. These 4 steps will give you the combination of the mysterious disk (78).
localizations.hint_34: Not a second to lose, you see the guardian escaping through a portal. Don't be distracted by the cards that follow each other, otherwise the portal will close. You won't be able to physically recover the 3rd page that the guardian is holding, but there is a way to immortalize the information found there...
localizations.hint_35: Not a second to lose, you see the guardian escaping through a portal. Don't be distracted by the cards that follow each other, otherwise the portal will close. You won't be able to physically recover the 3rd page that the guardian is holding, but there is a way to immortalize the information found there...
localizations.hint_36: Not a second to lose, you see the guardian escaping through a portal. Don't be distracted by the cards that follow each other, otherwise the portal will close. You won't be able to physically recover the 3rd page that the guardian is holding, but there is a way to immortalize the information found there...
localizations.hint_39: You need an object to cut your bonds.
localizations.hint_41: The shape of this commemorative coin seems familiar to you. But where have you seen a similar one?
localizations.hint_42: By using the runes in the photo gallery of Yun's phone, you can translate the text of this first page.
localizations.hint_43: The coin is stuck, but one of you should be able to recover it.
localizations.hint_44: The guardian is waiting for you to present the tickets to him before letting you access the Eiffel Tower. Yun must have saved them somewhere in her phone.
localizations.hint_46: A little change can be useful, otherwise it can always be used to scratch!
localizations.hint_59: To the naked eye, it is impossible to see what this shiny object is. You have to find something to observe this area more closely.
localizations.hint_65: One of the Escape Geeks members should be able to connect these two pages.
localizations.hint_66: The symbols represent the dishes present in the restaurant menu. There are two groups of five symbols. Each of these two groups will give you a number.
localizations.hint_69: No trap here. Simply do what is asked on this card.
localizations.hint_72_first: The end of this curious message refers to the names of the scientists inscribed on the facade of the Eiffel Tower (F and G). Only the end of some of them will be useful to you. But the end of which scientists?
localizations.hint_72: The numbers 4, 12, 9, 1, 15, 6 correspond to the position of the scientists on the facade. 4 is therefore Poncelet. Each of these six scientists will give you a letter. Together these letters will indicate the number of a reel to watch.
localizations.hint_76: The elevator controls are indeed out of order, but above the buttons you notice a lock that can accommodate an old key...
localizations.hint_78: This disk probably protects access to the first page of Merlin's Book. Curious symbols seem to have a correspondence with the letters of our alphabet. To obtain the combination, you will first have to find the right reel to watch in the projection room (99) and visualize the glittering object behind the pigeons (32).
localizations.hint_80: Have you correctly recovered card D?
localizations.hint_81: The 'Since' present on the keypad may not be a brand, but a clue indicating that the code is a date...
localizations.hint_82: Who would be the most able to recover the phone in all discretion?
localizations.hint_86: Here are the coins inserted into the machine. To make your commemorative coin, you must now activate the mechanism by turning the crank.
localizations.hint_88: The menu is in Japanese, but there is on the cover enough to access an English version.
localizations.hint_91: One of your companions is able to help you in your ascent. But which one is the most capable of redoubling efforts to carry your bag?
localizations.hint_99_first: Only four steps of the construction of the Eiffel Tower will be useful to you. If it hasn't already been done, try to visualize the shiny object hidden by the pigeons (32).
localizations.hint_99: Once found, the metal plate (33) gives you the order of four steps of construction of the Eiffel Tower. These 4 steps will provide you with a combination. Have you noticed the symbols present on the images of the construction film? They are the same symbols as on the mysterious disk (78).
localizations.hint_116: There are sixteen names of scientists written on this facade. These names will serve you later in the adventure.
localizations.hint_117: There are sixteen names of scientists written on this facade. These names will serve you later in the adventure.
localizations.hint_120: This is where the 2nd page of Merlin's Book is kept. Once the tiles (25) are activated, use the content of the menu (88) to access the page.
localizations.hint_122: If you still haven't understood who you were dealing with, there is a detail on the guardian that will put you on the trail.
localizations.hint_333: Have you correctly recovered card C?
localizations.hint_555: The right enchantment must be chosen to reconstitute the rune seal. What do you want to do with the Eiffel Tower? Make it invisible, silent, protect it or destroy it?
localizations.hint_999: Not a second to lose, you see the guardian escaping through a portal. Don't be distracted by the cards that follow each other, otherwise the portal will close. You won't be able to physically recover the 3rd page that the guardian is holding, but there is a way to immortalize the information found there...
localizations.answer_hint_6: Aim at the object that shines on the card (59), you will see the details of the object.
localizations.answer_hint_7: Observe Yun's T-shirt. The Escape Geeks logo is printed on it. The 'G' is stylized with dots arranged as on the phone's locked screen. Trace this same 'G' on the phone to unlock it.
localizations.answer_hint_8: There is a lock above the elevator buttons (76). The controls do not respond, but this old key (8) probably also allows to activate the elevator to reach the 2nd floor. Try to insert it into the lock.
localizations.answer_hint_14: Once Yun's phone is unlocked, click on the photo of the pages of Merlin's Book. Drag the three runes corresponding to the 'Protection' enchantment into the middle of the circle.
localizations.answer_hint_15: By following the light lines from the foot of the Eiffel Tower, it takes the form of a rune. Take the card that corresponds to the letter R, see the photo 'The Secret of the Runes'.
localizations.answer_hint_16: Insert the two coins (24 and 46) at the same time into the machine (16) by adding the three numbers. Notice moreover that the red puzzle piece icon exceptionally seems to be able to accommodate two blue puzzle pieces.
localizations.answer_hint_23: You now have two pages (23 and 42) of Merlin's Book. Try to assemble them.
localizations.answer_hint_26: When you have recovered the coin stuck in the coin slot (43), use it (46) to scratch the paint (26) and discover the hidden message.
localizations.answer_hint_32: Attract the pigeons (32) with Romain's sandwich (27) so that they release the view.
localizations.answer_hint_34: Open Yun's phone and quickly take a photo of the page the guardian is holding before the portal closes!
localizations.answer_hint_35: Open Yun's phone and quickly take a photo of the page the guardian is holding before the portal closes!
localizations.answer_hint_36: Open Yun's phone and quickly take a photo of the page the guardian is holding before the portal closes!
localizations.answer_hint_39: Use the sharp edges of the commemorative coin (41) to cut the bonds (39).
localizations.answer_hint_41: Notice the shape of the socket under the wall decoration (25): it corresponds exactly to the shape of the commemorative coin (41). Try to insert it there.
localizations.answer_hint_42: The translation of the runes is 'Merlin's Book'. You now need to find the 2nd page of the book by going to the 2nd floor.
localizations.answer_hint_43: Ask Romain (3), who is endowed with formidable strength, to play his muscles in order to unstick the coin (43).
localizations.answer_hint_44: Use the dedicated button in the app to consult Yun's phone. Go to the photo gallery and look for the tickets. There is a red modifier (+47) there. Then show the tickets to the guardian (44).
localizations.answer_hint_59: The spyglass will allow you to see more closely this object that shines in the distance. Open machine 6 and point your camera at the shiny object (59).
localizations.answer_hint_65: Yun (4) is a DIY ace. Ask her to try to connect the two pages (65).
localizations.answer_hint_66: Once you have had access to the French version of the menu (88), follow on it the order of the dishes indicated by the tiles (66). The first five dishes of the tiles draw a 2 on the menu. The others draw a 3.
localizations.answer_hint_69: Use the dedicated button in the app and open Yun's phone camera to photograph the two connected pages.
localizations.answer_hint_72: The message under the paint (72) indicates that it is the end of the 4th, 12th, 9th, 1st, 15th and 6th scientists who keeps the 1st page of Merlin's Book. It is therefore necessary to take the last letter of Poncelet (T), Lavoisier (R), Laplace (E), Seguin (N), Flachat (T) and Lagrange (E): TRENTE. The reel symbol then invites you to go look at reel no. 30 in the viewing room (99). Open machine 99 in the app and enter the number 30.
localizations.answer_hint_81: The code is indeed the year of the creation of the Eiffel Tower. This date is present on the commemorative coin (41). Enter the code 1889.
localizations.answer_hint_82: Bérénice (1) is known for her discretion. Send her to recover the phone placed on the desk (82).
localizations.answer_hint_86: Touch the crank with your finger and turn it on itself.
localizations.answer_hint_88: Notice the presence of a QR code on the menu cover. Use the dedicated button in the app and open Yun's phone camera to scan it.
localizations.answer_hint_91: Although endowed with formidable strength, Romain is asthmatic and also seems a bit out of breath (91). Ask Karim (2) instead, the enduring sportsman, who, ahead of the group, seems to be in great shape.
localizations.answer_hint_99: Identify during the film projection the four construction steps indicated by the metal plate (33). Each of these four steps provides you with a curious symbol. You therefore obtain four symbols, and the mysterious disk (78) gives you for each the corresponding letter. By following the order of the steps on the metal plate (33), you obtain the letters O, N, Z and E. Which is the number ONZE.
localizations.answer_hint_122: Notice the tattoo on the guardian's arm. This rune is the symbol of the Odal cult. It is also present on the back of one of the cards in your pack. Take the card that corresponds to the letter O, see the photo 'The Secret of the Runes'.
localizations.answer_hint_555: You obviously want to prevent the Eiffel Tower from collapsing by forming a 'Protection' seal. Open machine 14 and drag the three runes corresponding to the 'Protection' enchantment.
localizations.answer_hint_999: Open Yun's phone and quickly take a photo of the page the guardian is holding before the portal closes!
localizations.machine_6: You can better distinguish the object.
localizations.machine_81: It's the right code. You push the door gently.
localizations.machine_86: After a few clicks, a small metallic object falls into a bin located under the machine mechanism.
localizations.machine_6_card_32: There are many pigeons, difficult to see the shiny object well.
localizations.photo_card_59: Your zoom is not powerful enough to see the shiny object. Maybe use another means.
localizations.photo_card_69: Your excitement is short-lived : as soon as you took the photo, the Eiffel Tower guardian arrives. He approaches you with a disturbing smile before engaging in conversation.
localizations.end:
As soon as the photo is taken, the guardian disappears in a burst of light. You immediately open your phone's gallery to check your last photo. It is perfectly sharp, and the information on the 3rd page is very legible. You have saved the Eiffel Tower and discovered the existence of a precious artifact. And even if the guardian fled with it, you keep irrefutable proof of it.

Congratulations!
localizations.machine_99_title:
There are many reels.
Which one do you want to project?
